name: intelligent-agent-system
description: Self-evolving autonomous agent system with mission-driven exploration and knowledge compilation

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @intelligent-agent/shared && npm run build --workspace @intelligent-agent-system/llm-wiki-compiler && npm run build --workspace autonomous-agent
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @intelligent-agent/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @intelligent-agent-system/llm-wiki-compiler && npm run typecheck --workspace autonomous-agent
scripts.test: npm test --workspace @intelligent-agent/shared && npm test --workspace @intelligent-agent-system/llm-wiki-compiler && npm test --workspace autonomous-agent
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @intelligent-agent/shared && npm run lint --workspace @intelligent-agent-system/llm-wiki-compiler && npm run lint --workspace autonomous-agent && npm run format:check
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace autonomous-agent && npm run clean --workspace @intelligent-agent-system/llm-wiki-compiler && npm run clean --workspace @intelligent-agent/shared

author: linzili
